text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Inari—here's something that might interest
you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
While I was out and about earlier, I saw a
portable shrine.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So I think there must be a local festival going on.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Really? That's what this Edo girl likes to hear! I've
gotta get involved!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... Are you thinking of carrying the shrine?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
'Course I am! The shrine's the centerpiece of a
festival!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm worried, though. It was so large...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What're you talkin' about? I can lift a portable
shrine or two any day of the—

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...But won't the other carriers lift you up along
with the shrine?
